user_request: Emergency rite: ground-to-orbit link requires operation
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Emergency rite: ground-to-orbit link requires operation

### TOPIC
ground-to-orbit link

### COMPONENT
ground-to-orbit link

### OPERATION
operation

### FORMAT
call_response

### MUST_INCLUDE
- ground-to-orbit link
- operation

### PRAYER
prayer:
Priest: Blessed be the ground-to-orbit link, conduit of the Omnissiah's will!
Congregation: We invoke the Machine Spirit of the ground-to-orbit link!
Priest: First, calibrate the transponder frequencies with holy precision.
Congregation: Second, purge the signal pathways of corrupting interference!
Priest: Third, align the dish apparatus toward the celestial throne.
Congregation: The ground-to-orbit link shall operation in sanctified harmony!

Congregation: The material purity shall endure through testing eternal!
